CHAMP-AMULET_OF_UNYIELDING.title: Amulet of Unyielding
CHAMP-AMULET_OF_UNYIELDING.description: Whenever you spend Vigor, gain 1 Strength for every 8 Vigor spent.
CHAMP-AMULET_OF_UNYIELDING.flavor: Strength once thought fleeting flows through you as if it had always been there.
CHAMP-BERSERKERS_GUIDE.title: Berserker's Guide
CHAMP-BERSERKERS_GUIDE.description: At the start of your turn, gain 3 Vigor.
CHAMP-BLACK_KNIGHTS_HELM.title: Black Knight's Helm
CHAMP-BLACK_KNIGHTS_HELM.description: The first time you enter each Stance each combat: Defensive: Gain 2 Dexterity and lose 1 Strength. Berserker: Gain 2 Strength and lose 1 Dexterity.
CHAMP-CHAMPIONS_CROWN.title: Champion's Crown
CHAMP-CHAMPIONS_CROWN.description: Once per combat, you may enter a Stance you are not in.
CHAMP-DEFENSIVE_THESIS.title: Defensive Thesis
CHAMP-DEFENSIVE_THESIS.description: Defensive Stance's Finisher Bonus grants 3 more Block.
CHAMP-DOLPHINS_STYLE_GUIDE.title: Dolphin's Style Guide
CHAMP-DOLPHINS_STYLE_GUIDE.description: If you end your turn while in no Stance, draw 1 additional card next turn.
CHAMP-DOLPHINS_STYLE_GUIDE.flavor: Author: Renowned explorer and pugilist Dolphin K. Mist.
CHAMP-GLADIATORS_MANUAL.title: Gladiators Manual
CHAMP-GLADIATORS_MANUAL.description: Whenever you play a Combo, a Finisher, and enter a Stance in the same turn, gain 1 Strength and Dexterity.
CHAMP-INNER_STRENGTH.title: Inner Strength
CHAMP-INNER_STRENGTH.flavor: It's about the gigantic sword in your heart.
CHAMP-POWER_ARMOR.title: Power Armor
CHAMP-POWER_ARMOR.description: Gain @ChE at the start of your turn. Your maximum Vigor and Counter is 10.
CHAMP-SIGNATURE_FINISHER.title: Signature Finisher
CHAMP-SIGNATURE_FINISHER.description: Upon pickup, choose a Finisher. This Finisher costs 0, can be used without a Stance, and never causes your Stance to be exited.
CHAMP-SIGNATURE_FINISHER.flavor: And now, it's time for my ULTIMATE MOVE!
CHAMP-SPECTRES_HAND.title: Spectre's Hand
CHAMP-SPECTRES_HAND.description: Whenever you enter a Stance, gain an Echo of a basic Strike or Defend. It costs 0.
CHAMP-VICTORIOUS_CROWN.title: Victorious Crown
CHAMP-VICTORIOUS_CROWN.description:
Start each combat in a random [gold]Stance[/gold], and then trigger that [gold]Stance's Skill Bonus [/gold]twice.
The first time you play a [gold]Finisher[/gold] each turn, draw 2 cards and enter a random [gold]Stance[/gold].
CHAMP-VICTORIOUS_CROWN.flavor: Conglaturation!! You are the greatest winner.
